def positive_cross_file_copy_paste_function():
    rule_id = "cross_file_copy_paste_function"
    family = "duplication"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Highly similar non-test function bodies repeated across multiple Python files."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
